goal: Add a side-effect-free receipt preflight builder that validates cockpit patch consume execution authority is ready for later receipt recording while keeping permit consume, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, record receipts, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch consume execution authority can be preflighted for later receipt recording without applying it.
Receipt ref, recorder ref, and receipt policy ref are required.
Permit consume, receipt recording, and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption, receipt recording, and patch application require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing receipt ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, receipt recording, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-135 recorded side-effect-free cockpit patch consume execution authorization without consuming the permit or applying a patch.
